metadata.title: DetailedPlan — core artifact of the Engineering phase

description: A full collection of DetailedPlanStep blueprints for a goal — the core artifact of the Engineering phase (src/shared/models/workflow_models.py). step_count is a @property derived value, not a declared field. NOTE: get_steps_requiring_code() hardcodes four action names ({file.create, file.edit, create_file, edit_file}) — file.create and file.edit are valid registered action IDs; create_file and edit_file are legacy names not in the current ActionRegistry. This is a constitutional violation (hardcoded action vocabulary in src/) pending a governor-authorized fix. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

goal.description: Human-readable goal statement for this plan.

metadata.description: Plan-level metadata (dict[str, Any]). Default empty dict.
